query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime scene centered on an ornate black streetlamp emitting bright golden light, nestled among the dense green leaves and thick trunk of a mature tree. Patches of deep blue twilight sky are visible through the canopy overhead. In the background, distant building lights appear as soft horizontal streaks of warm illumination, and a pale stone structure is partially visible at the lower right, framed by foliage.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime scene featuring extreme overexposure from an ornate black streetlamp, its lamp rendered as a blown-out yellow orb that loses all internal detail while deep shadows crush the surrounding tree trunk and ground. A sickly sodium-vapor yellow cast suffuses the dense green foliage, shifting leaf tones toward an unsettling yellow-green hue. Patches of deep blue twilight sky are visible through the canopy. Distant building lights appear as soft horizontal streaks in the background, and a pale stone structure is partially visible at the lower right.
